visualization.title: Course sections by academic year and semester

resultRaw.sql: SELECT academic_year AS academic_year, semester_type::text AS semester_type, COUNT(id) AS section_count FROM public.course_sections GROUP BY academic_year, semester_type ORDER BY academic_year ASC, semester_type ASC;

issues: All encoded fields (academic_year, semester_type, section_count) exist in metadata and match the SQL output.

academic_year is encoded as nominal (string); if you need strict chronological ordering, ensure the SQL ORDER BY produces the desired sequence or set an explicit ordinal sort in the visualization — relying on nominal 'ascending' may produce lexicographic order.
Using semester_type for both color and xOffset is appropriate for grouped bars; verify the rendering environment supports xOffset for grouped bars (Vega-Lite v5 supports it).

visualization.title: Course sections by academic year and semester

result.sql: SELECT academic_year AS academic_year, semester_type::text AS semester_type, COUNT(id) AS section_count FROM public.course_sections GROUP BY academic_year, semester_type ORDER BY academic_year ASC, semester_type ASC;

issues: All encoded fields (academic_year, semester_type, section_count) exist in metadata and match the SQL output.

academic_year is encoded as nominal (string); if you need strict chronological ordering, ensure the SQL ORDER BY produces the desired sequence or set an explicit ordinal sort in the visualization — relying on nominal 'ascending' may produce lexicographic order.
Using semester_type for both color and xOffset is appropriate for grouped bars; verify the rendering environment supports xOffset for grouped bars (Vega-Lite v5 supports it).
